text:

>=20

>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:

>=20

> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Looks alright to me, if a committer would like to put this through =
that'd be great.

Geoff=
